userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.
